title: Passing Variables to OpenApi Spec File for API Gateway Instantiation using CDK
body:
AWS CDK provides the ability to instantiate an API Gateway using an OpenAPI spec file that exists locally:

String specFilePath = "spec_file.yaml"

Asset openApiAsset = Asset.Builder.create(..., "assetId").path(specFilePath).build()

Map<String, String> transformMap = Map.of("Location", openAPIAsset.getS3ObjectUrl)

IResolvable data = Fn.transform("AWS::Include", transformMap)

InlineApiDefinition apiDefinition = ApiDefinition.fromInline(data)

SpecRestApi specRestApi = SpecRestApi.Builder.create(...).apiDefinition(apiDefinition)...

How can variables be substituted into the spec file at runtime?

In other words, is it possible for spec_file.yaml to have a placeholder resembling ${fill_in_at_runtime} that can be passed in when instantiating the ApiDefinition? Something of the form

InlineApiDefinition apiDefinition =
    ApiDefinition.fromInline(data).replace("fill_in_at_runtime", "42")

Thank you in advance for your consideration and response.
